name: Max DeBroux
ai_summary: Max DeBroux is a 21-year-old University of Utah student with two years of preschool and summer camp experience working with children from preschool to middle school. He demonstrates strong conflict de-escalation skills, patience, and a calm communication style that makes him well-suited for childcare roles.

Food. Heat it up, put it on a tray, with silverware and plates, serve the food, and then do the dishes afterwards. In addition to this, I worked at summer camps with kids, aged up to a middle school age. I've worked for Des Northwest in Seattle, and pedal heads in Seattle as well. I love engaging with the kids and I love teaching it's definitely a passion of mine that I'm looking to get more experience.
